chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. D- 11 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.02.2022 For orders on MA 1537/22 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 1538/22 For hearing of main case Mr. Wishandas Kolhi, Advocate along with applicant 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Maya Ram seeks protective bail in Complaint No. 02 of 2022 filed in court of Anti-Terrorism Judge, Mirpurkhas under Section 386, 392, 506-II PPC read with Section 6/7 ATA. It is contended by learned counsel for applicant that the facts narrated in the Direct Complaint are false and fabricated as it has been filed due to personal enmity; that the incident shown in the direct Complaint has never taken place; that learned trial court without conducting any inquiry into the facts of the case has issued N.B.Ws against the applicant which may be suspended as the applicants apprehends their arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, the N.B.Ws issued by the trial court are suspended and applicant Maya Ram is granted protective bail for five days enabling him to approach concerned forum subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days from today or whenever he approaches the concerned court whichever is earlier. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
